Research Assistant

University of Guelph

We are seeking a motivated Research Assistant to support ongoing projects in the Department of Molecular Biology.

Responsibilities include sample preparation, data entry, literature review, and general laboratory support under the supervision of a senior researcher.

Requirements:
  • Enrollment in a relevant undergraduate program (biology, chemistry, biochemistry)
  • Familiarity with basic laboratory safety protocols
  • Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English
Nice to have:
  • Previous volunteer or academic lab experience
  • Knowledge of Python or R for data analysis

This is a part-time position (15 hours/week) during the academic term. Guelph, ON. Competitive hourly rate.
